description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The facade is accented by horizontal wooden slats that provide both shade and visual interest, especially above windows and on balcony railings. Large, rectangular windows with dark blue-tinted glass are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, allowing ample natural light inside. The building includes multiple balconies and covered outdoor spaces, with a flat roof and a mix of open and enclosed areas. The main entrance is recessed and sheltered, with a small overhang and a series of steps leading up to the door. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, white house with flat roofs, large blue-tinted windows, and wooden slat accents, featuring multiple balconies and a recessed main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large blue-tinted windows, and prominent wooden slat accents above the entry and balcony.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered balconies, additional wooden slat shading, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_2: Rear view with a long balcony, several windows, and a tall, windowless section on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying a tall vertical window, a large picture window, and more wooden slat features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small overhang, steps, and minimalistic modern door
